en.quote_text: "A reader lives a thousand lives before he dies. The man who never reads lives only one."
en.sec_hero_desc: Manage your password and login sessions.
en.hist_hero_desc: A timeline of the worlds you've visited.
en.goal_hero_desc: Push your limits. Consistent reading expands your mind.
en.nset_due_desc: Get notified 2 days before your book is due.
en.nset_req_desc: Instant alerts when admin approves your books.
en.nset_new_desc: Weekly summary of new books added to shelf.
en.nset_rec_desc: Books based on your reading history.
en.sug_hero_desc: Tell us what books you want to see here.
en.don_hero_desc: Rehome your books to our community.
en.rep_hero_desc: Let us know if something isn't right.
en.cont_hero_desc: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.
